headline: Truckin' Trouble
subtext: The council's rubbish collection service causes traffic chaos as smelly garbage trucks block key intersections. Ratepayers demand answers and action from their tax-funded bureaucracy.
body:
Wacky news report by Senior Reporter for The Remy Digest (Northern Beaches, Australia)

NORTHERN BEACHES—In a shocking incident that has left the residents of Northern Beaches fuming, smelly garbage trucks have been sighted blocking roads around local hotspots such as The Steyne, The Corso, and B-Line. Reports of foul odours emanating from the trucks have caused widespread disgust among locals.

"Cr" (councillor) Johnson, whose job it is to deal with the stench-filled situation, said that the truck drivers had failed their "Garbage 101" course on proper waste disposal. According to Cr Johnson, these drivers are now a menace to society and an affront to the sanctity of the footpaths.

The council chambers have been inundated with complaints from irate citizens demanding immediate action. A local ratepayer quoted, “I'm not saying that these drivers should be thrown into the garbage pit, but surely there is something they could do to help clear up this s**t.”

The Remy Digest urges our readers to remain calm and patient as authorities grapple with the problem of how to dispose of smelly rubbish without further inconveniencing the residents. More updates on this issue are expected in the coming days.

Stay tuned for more truckin' trouble or contact The Remy Digest (Northern Beaches, Australia) at news@theremdigest.com.au.

professor.title: From The Archives
professor.content: The archives are currently closed due to a flea infestation.

classifieds: For Sale: Cursed Lucky Hat. One size fits all nightmares. $50. Contact: 1-800-MAD-HAT.
LOST & FOUND: Time-Consuming Tardigrade. Last seen in the molecular biology lab at Manly Uni. No reward too absurd to ignore. Contact: 1-9000-Lost-Time.
SPECIAL SERVICES: Self-Deluding Life Coach. Will convince you that your dreams are realistic and attainable, while secretly sabotaging your progress. $100/hr. Contact: 1-800-Coach-Me-In.

mystic.prediction: As The Mystic residing on Sydney's Northern Beaches, I forewarn Cancers to brace themselves for an arduous real estate ordeal that may disrupt their quaint B-Line bus commute, but remember to enjoy your surf sessions and savor the local coffee culture amid the bustling beach life.
